restaurant_openings.name: Las Vegas Wins Its First James Beard Best Chef Award in 15 Years
restaurant_openings.summary: On June 15, 2026, Las Vegas was recognized with its first James Beard Foundation Best Chef award in almost two decades. Casa Playa chef Sarah Thompson took home the 2026 James Beard Awards Best Chef: Southwest. It’s a massive win for the celebrated chef, her restaurant, and for the City of Las Vegas; the last […]

restaurant_openings.name: At Maroon, Kwame Onwuachi Takes an Afro-Caribbean Lens to the Classic Steakhouse
restaurant_openings.summary: Chef Kwame Onwuachi — the James Beard Award–winning chef behind New York’s Tatiana and Washington, D.C.’s Dōgon — made his Las Vegas debut with a new Caribbean steakhouse in the Sahara. At Maroon, which opened in late April, Onwuachi takes an Afro-Caribbean lens to the classic steakhouse, reimagining it with flavors and techniques from Jamaica […]

restaurant_openings.name: The Golden Tiki
restaurant_openings.summary: The Golden Tiki remixes its menu of snacks and cocktails, featuring lighter snacks like gochujang cucumbers and a crab Rangoon dip as strong companions to the new cocktail offerings.

restaurant_openings.name: Doanburi
restaurant_openings.summary: Sushi chef Jae Doan and her partner, Katie Ray, opened Doanburi in the southwest valley in January, transitioning from a cloud kitchen to a permanent location.

restaurant_openings.name: Mama Mai Vietnamese Café
restaurant_openings.summary: The new southwest spot quickly garnered a loyal following for homemade banh mi sandwiches and coffee, delivering a taste of home.

restaurant_openings.name: Lotus of Siam / NADC / Redhead Burger
restaurant_openings.summary: Lotus of Siam is back, Resorts World introduces Savor Society, NADC has opened Downtown, and Redhead Burger is open at the Grand Canal Shoppes.

restaurant_openings.name: Sartiano’s Italian Steakhouse
restaurant_openings.summary: Sartiano’s brings Manhattan steakhouse confidence and Italian indulgence to Wynn Las Vegas, the brainchild of legendary chef Alfred Portale.

restaurant_openings.name: Las Vegas Ballpark Gourmet Menu
restaurant_openings.summary: Las Vegas Ballpark debuts a gourmet 2026 menu beyond hot dogs, rolling out wood-fired pizza, Philly steaks, and Hawaiian-inspired plates.

restaurant_openings.name: Bar Boheme
restaurant_openings.summary: Bar Boheme sets an opulent new table with a new prix fixe menu that remains affordable, featuring a first course, main course, and dessert course.

restaurant_openings.name: Maroon / Villa’s Tacos
restaurant_openings.summary: The anticipated Afro-Caribbean steakhouse concept Maroon will open at Sahara, and Villa’s Tacos is coming to Durango.
restaurant_openings.venue_or_address: Sahara Las Vegas and Durango Resort

restaurant_openings.name: Cantina Contramar
restaurant_openings.summary: Gabriela Cámara delivers sophistication from Mexico City with the opening of Cantina Contramar, an offshoot of her acclaimed seafood destination at Fontainebleau.

restaurant_openings.name: Vegas Unstripped
restaurant_openings.summary: Vegas Unstripped returns for its seventh year at the Palms, focusing on the creative talents of local Las Vegas chefs.

events_calendar.name: Marc Anthony - Vegas... My Way!
events_calendar.summary: Experience the iconic Latin superstar live in his Las Vegas residency at Fontainebleau. The show features his signature high-energy performance and soulful vocals.

events_calendar.name: New Kids On the Block: The Right Stuff Las Vegas Residency
events_calendar.summary: The legendary boy band returns to Las Vegas for their The Right Stuff residency. Fans can enjoy a night of nostalgia and high-energy pop hits at Dolby Live.

events_calendar.name: VIVA LA LISA
events_calendar.summary: Lisa from BLACKPINK brings her spectacular solo performance to The Colosseum at Caesars Palace. The show promises a stunning visual and musical experience for fans.

events_calendar.name: Mystère by Cirque du Soleil
events_calendar.summary: The original Cirque du Soleil production in Las Vegas featuring acrobatics and imagery. It offers a whimsical and thrilling performance at Treasure Island.

events_calendar.name: ABSINTHE
events_calendar.summary: An adult-themed circus show featuring wild acts and comedy in an intimate tent. It is known for its irreverent humor and spectacular feats at Caesars Palace.

events_calendar.name: Blue Man Group
events_calendar.summary: A high-energy show combining music, comedy, and multimedia theatrics at the Luxor Hotel and Casino. The performance features the world-famous bald and blue trio.

events_calendar.name: Jabbawockeez
events_calendar.summary: The world-famous dance crew performs their high-tech signature choreography at MGM Grand. This production features incredible visuals and precision dance moves.

events_calendar.name: Penn and Teller
events_calendar.summary: The legendary magic duo performs their long-running show filled with classic and new tricks at Rio Las Vegas. It blends sophisticated magic with edgy comedy.

events_calendar.name: Awakening
events_calendar.summary: A spectacular 360-degree theater experience with mythic storytelling and technology at Wynn Las Vegas. The show features a custom-built stage and immersive effects.

events_calendar.name: Michael Jackson ONE
events_calendar.summary: A sonic and visual journey into the world of Michael Jackson by Cirque du Soleil at Mandalay Bay. The show celebrates the King of Pop's creative legacy through dance and acrobatics.

events_calendar.name: Kelly Clarkson: Studio Sessions - The Las Vegas Residency
events_calendar.summary: Catch Kelly Clarkson live in her Studio Sessions residency. The show features her powerhouse vocals and hit songs in an intimate setting.

events_calendar.name: Billy Idol: Hot In The City
events_calendar.summary: Rock legend Billy Idol brings his Hot In The City residency to Las Vegas. Fans can expect a night of classic rock hits and high-energy performance.

events_calendar.name: Sammy Hagar: The Best of All Worlds Las Vegas Residency
events_calendar.summary: Experience Sammy Hagar's high-energy rock residency in Las Vegas. The show features a celebration of his extensive career and greatest hits.

events_calendar.name: Rod Stewart: The Encore Shows Las Vegas Residency
events_calendar.summary: Rod Stewart returns for his encore shows in Las Vegas. The legendary singer performs his iconic hits in a spectacular live production.

events_calendar.name: Wayne Newton: Up Close & Personal
events_calendar.summary: Mr. Las Vegas himself, Wayne Newton, performs an intimate show featuring stories and songs from his legendary career. This is a must-see for fans of classic Vegas entertainment.
